item.title: Royma Industrial CT Launches New X-Ray Inspection Systems
item.description: Royma Industrial CT's new X-ray inspection systems address evolving quality assurance needs in the battery, die-casting, and electronics sectors.

item.title: Malaysia’s TTVision Holdings Berhad enters India’s solar manufacturing market - pv magazine India
item.description: TTVision Holdings Berhad's entry into India's solar manufacturing market showcases the growing application of machine vision in the renewable energy sector.

item.title: Automated Optical Inspection Market Size, Share, Growth, 2034 - Straits Research
item.description: Straits Research report details the size, share, and projected growth of the Automated Optical Inspection market through 2034, indicating strong commercial prospects.

item.title: Swiss Delvitech raises ₹354-crore, to open mfg plant for optical inspection machines in India - ET Telecom
item.description: Swiss Delvitech's ₹354-crore investment to open a manufacturing plant in India highlights the expanding global market for optical inspection machines.

item.title: KAIS Unveils Automation Solutions Integrated with AI Technology... Targeting 3D Measurement and Inspection
item.description: KAIS introduces new AI-integrated automation solutions focused on 3D measurement and inspection, expanding turnkey offerings for defect detection.

item.title: JAI Wave Series SWIR Line Scan Cameras
item.description: The introduction of the new JAI Wave Series SWIR line scan cameras provides enhanced hardware capabilities for industrial machine vision and defect recognition systems.

item.title: Robotiq Introduces IQ Platform to Automate Robotic Workcell Integration
item.description: Robotiq's new IQ Platform provides a commercial turnkey solution to automate robotic workcell integration, advancing factory automation capabilities.
